price: An jenem Tag werdet ihr vorgeführt; nichts von euch wird verborgen bleiben.
arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٖ تُعۡرَضُونَ لَا تَخۡفَىٰ مِنكُمۡ خَافِيَةٞ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: yawma-idhin tuʿ'raḍūna lā takhfā minkum khāfiyatun
